name: Coding Harness
description: Coding agent toolkit — Edit, MultiEdit, TodoWrite, background process tools, plan mode, and OI Bridge Tier 1 (introspection). Tiers 2-5 removed in 2026-04-25 trim cleanup because each overlapped with native OC features (channels+MCP, OpenCLI, BashTool, cron).
author: OpenComputer Contributors
